root_text.an5.6:1.1: “Na tāva, bhikkhave, akusalassa samāpatti hoti yāva saddhā paccupaṭṭhitā hoti kusalesu dhammesu.
root_text.an5.6:1.2: Yato ca kho, bhikkhave, saddhā antarahitā hoti, assaddhiyaṁ pariyuṭṭhāya tiṭṭhati;
root_text.an5.6:2.1: Na tāva, bhikkhave, akusalassa samāpatti hoti yāva hirī paccupaṭṭhitā hoti kusalesu dhammesu.
root_text.an5.6:2.2: Yato ca kho, bhikkhave, hirī antarahitā hoti, ahirikaṁ pariyuṭṭhāya tiṭṭhati;
root_text.an5.6:3.1: Na tāva, bhikkhave, akusalassa samāpatti hoti yāva ottappaṁ paccupaṭṭhitaṁ hoti kusalesu dhammesu.
root_text.an5.6:3.2: Yato ca kho, bhikkhave, ottappaṁ antarahitaṁ hoti, anottappaṁ pariyuṭṭhāya tiṭṭhati;
root_text.an5.6:4.1: Na tāva, bhikkhave, akusalassa samāpatti hoti yāva vīriyaṁ paccupaṭṭhitaṁ hoti kusalesu dhammesu.
root_text.an5.6:4.2: Yato ca kho, bhikkhave, vīriyaṁ antarahitaṁ hoti, kosajjaṁ pariyuṭṭhāya tiṭṭhati;
root_text.an5.6:5.1: Na tāva, bhikkhave, akusalassa samāpatti hoti yāva paññā paccupaṭṭhitā hoti kusalesu dhammesu.
root_text.an5.6:5.2: Yato ca kho, bhikkhave, paññā antarahitā hoti, duppaññā pariyuṭṭhāya tiṭṭhati;

translation_text.an5.6:1.1: “Mendicants, you don’t become unskillful as long as faith is established in skillful qualities.
translation_text.an5.6:1.2: But when faith vanishes and faithlessness takes over,
translation_text.an5.6:2.1: You don’t become unskillful as long as conscience … prudence … energy … wisdom is established in skillful qualities.
translation_text.an5.6:5.2: But when wisdom vanishes and witlessness takes over,
